notes: Polished Pathmark Online readiness messaging so Google/Sync status is shown in one compact banner.
Reframed routines as containers with routine activities that drive tasklists, calendar blocks and Google Tasks prompts.
Clarified Calendar vs weekly tasklist vs Google Tasks behaviour, including date-only Google Tasks prompts and no duration support in the export.
Made goal/project forms more SMART-style and renamed goal actions as goal activities where they are exportable one-off steps.
Improved setup parity by using the normal routine and goal managers during setup and allowing multiple routine activities.
Tidied Google Calendar Export with a card preview and moved technical fields into an expander.
Improved printable tasklist PDF sanitisation so HTML line breaks do not appear and checkbox rows use clean empty boxes.
Restored seasonal online themes with light and dark variants for Summer, Autumn, Winter and Spring.
Fixed button/link-button contrast, including the Open sync sheet button, and improved Area colour preview behaviour in setup.
Removed redundant example guidance from Settings and refined user-facing privacy wording.
